metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1316
metadata.comment: Rationale: Authors generate two independent shRNAs against the rat sequence of JAK2 in order to investigate the role of the protein in NMDA-LTD. Transfected hippocampal organotypic slices were used to test this. While basal synaptic transmission was unaffected in transfected slices, NMDA-LTD was absent in those neurons expressing the shRNAs against JAK2 while neurons expressing the control shRNA did express LTD as expected.. Experimental description: Experiments were performed in rat hippocampal slices and the shRNAs used agains JAK2 were generated against the rat sequence. Literal "the sequences of the 29-mer shRNAs against rat JAK2 were GCCATCAGCAAACTAAAGAAGGCAGGAAA for the shRNA-1 and CAGCCTGTTTACTCCAGATTATGAACTGC for the shRNA-2."
